spotify_show_account_account_get.description:
description: Show your account information. Unlike show_profile, this includes private information.
model: User
---
success:
{
    "first_name": "string",
    "last_name": "string",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "registered_at": "2019-01-01T00:00:00",
    "last_logged_in": "2019-01-01T00:00:00",
    "verified": true,
    "is_premium": true
}
failure:
{"message": "string"}

spotify_signup_account_post.description:
description: Sign up to create account.
model: User
---
{"message": "string"}

parameters.name: first_name
parameters.description: Your first name

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.description: Your last name

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Your email address.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Your password.

parameters.name: password_reset_code

spotify_search_songs_songs_get.description:
description: Search for songs with a query.
model: Song
---
success:
[
    {
        "song_id": 1,
        "title": "string",
        "album_id": 1,
        "album_title": "string",
        "duration": 1,
        "artists": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "name": "string"
            }
        ],
        "release_date": "2019-01-01T00:00:00",
        "genre": "string",
        "play_count": 0.0,
        "rating": 0.0,
        "like_count": 1,
        "review_count": 1,
        "shareable_link": "string"
    }
]
failure:
{"message": "string"}

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: The index of the page to return.

parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: artist_id
parameters.description: The artist id to filter the search results by.

parameters.name: album_id
parameters.description: The album id to filter the search results by.

parameters.name: genre
parameters.description: The genre to filter the albums by.

parameters.name: min_release_date
parameters.description: The minimum release date for search results in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: max_release_date
parameters.description: The maximum release date for search results in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: min_duration
parameters.description: The minimum duration in seconds for search results.

parameters.name: max_duration
parameters.description: The maximum duration in seconds for search results.

parameters.name: min_rating
parameters.description: The minimum rating for search results.

parameters.name: max_rating
parameters.description: The maximum rating for search results.

parameters.name: min_like_count
parameters.description: The minimum like count for search results.

parameters.name: max_like_count
parameters.description: The maximum like count for search results.

parameters.name: min_play_count
parameters.description: The minimum play count for search results.

parameters.name: max_play_count
parameters.description: The maximum play count for search results.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The attribute to sort the songs by prefixed with +/- to reflect ascending/descending. Valid attributes: rating, like_count and play_count. If both query and sort_by are given and non-empty, results will be first ranked by query relevance, then paginated, and will then be sorted by the given attribute within each page.

spotify_show_playlist_library_library_pl.description:
description: Search or show a list of playlists in your playlist library.
model: Playlist
---
success:
[
    {
        "playlist_id": 1,
        "title": "string",
        "is_public": true,
        "rating": 0.0,
        "like_count": 1,
        "review_count": 1,
        "owner": {
            "name": "string",
            "email": "user@example.com"
        },
        "created_at": "2019-01-01T00:00:00",
        "song_ids": [
            1
        ]
    }
]
failure:
{"message": "string"}

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: The index of the page to return.

parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: is_public
parameters.description: Whether to show public playlists or private playlists.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The attribute to sort the library playlists by prefixed with +/- to reflect ascending/descending. Valid attributes: created_at and title. If both query and sort_by are given and non-empty, results will be first ranked by query relevance, then paginated, and will then be sorted by the given attribute within each page. If both query and sort_by are not given, null, or empty, sort_by will default to -created_at.

spotify_search_playlists_playlists_get.description:
description:
  Search for playlists with a query. It will search over all public playlists and your own private playlists.
  If the access token is not provided, it will only search public playlists.
model: Playlist
---
success:
[
    {
        "playlist_id": 1,
        "title": "string",
        "is_public": true,
        "rating": 0.0,
        "like_count": 1,
        "review_count": 1,
        "owner": {
            "name": "string",
            "email": "user@example.com"
        },
        "created_at": "2019-01-01T00:00:00",
        "song_ids": [
            1
        ]
    }
]
failure:
{"message": "string"}

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: min_like_count
parameters.description: The minimum like count for search results.

parameters.name: max_like_count
parameters.description: The maximum like count for search results.

parameters.name: min_rating
parameters.description: The minimum rating for search results.

parameters.name: max_rating
parameters.description: The maximum rating for search results.

parameters.name: owner_email
parameters.description: If passed, will filter results to only the ones owned by this user.

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: The index of the page to return.

parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The attribute to sort the playlists by prefixed with +/- to reflect ascending/descending. Valid attributes: like_count, rating and created_at. If both query and sort_by are given and non-empty, results will be first ranked by query relevance, then paginated, and will then be sorted by the given attribute within each page. If both query and sort_by are not given, null, or empty, sort_by will default to -like_count.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the playlist.

parameters.name: is_public
parameters.description: Whether the playlist is public or not.

}
failure:
{"message": "string"}

spotify_play_music_music_player_play_pos.description:
description:
  Play music based on various criteria.
  You can pass, at most, any one of queue_position, song_id, album_id or playlist_id.
  If one of song_id, album_id or playlist_id is passed, that song, album or playlist will be
  added to the queue and played. Otherwise, the queue will remain unchanged. If queue_position
  is passed, the song at that position in the queue will be played. If none is passed, the current
  song in the queue will be played.
model: MusicPlayer
---
success:
{
    "message": "string",
    "song_id": 1
}
failure:
{"message": "string"}

parameters.name: premium_subscription_id
parameters.description: ID of the premium subscription to download the receipt for.

parameters.name: file_system_access_token
parameters.description: Access token obtained from file_system app login.

parameters.name: download_to_file_path
parameters.description: The file path to download the receipt file to in file system app. Path can be absolute, starting with '/', or relative to the user's home directory, starting with '~/'. If not passed, it will be saved in your ~/downloads directory.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Whether to overwrite the file if it already exists.
